description: This file defines styles for badge components, including CSS variables, layout, font size, color, border radius, and specific styles for badges within buttons. It utilizes Sass mixins and variables for styling consistency and flexibility.

methods.name: rfs()
methods.description: A Sass mixin for applying responsive font size styling.

methods.name: font-size()
methods.description: A Sass mixin for setting font size.

methods.name: border-radius()
methods.description: A Sass mixin for setting border radius.

methods.name: gradient-bg()
methods.description: A Sass mixin for applying gradient background styles.
